zh.lifeSummary: 當Osmund de Stuteville於大約1116年出生在英國越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯時，他的父親Robert de Stuteville III42歲，母親Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith38歲。他於1170年與Isabel Gressenhall在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他去世於1192年8月在巴勒斯坦享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Osmund de Stuteville于大约1116年出生在英国越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯时，他的父亲Robert de Stuteville III42岁，母亲Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith38岁。他于1170年与Isabel Gressenhall在英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他去世于1192年8月在巴勒斯坦享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Osmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th-century revival of an Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + mund ‘protector’. The name was also in use among the Normans and was borne by an 11th-century saint who was appointed to the see of Salisbury by William the Conqueror. As a modern given name it may be in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this name.

en.lifeSummary: When Osmund de Stuteville was born about 1116, in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 42 and his mother, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, was 38. He married Isabel Gressenhall in 1170, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1189. He died in August 1192, in Palestine, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osmund de Stuteville est né environ 1116, à Burton Agnes, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Gressenhall en 1170, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. Il est décédé en août 1192, à Palestine, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Osmund de Stuteville um 1116 in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stuteville III 42 und seine Mutter Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith 38. Er hat 1170 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Isabel Gressenhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im August 1192 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osmund de Stuteville è nato il circa 1116 nel Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Stuteville III, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Gressenhall nel 1170, nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Morì nel agosto 1192, nel Palestina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Osmund de Stutevilleが約1116年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン アグネスで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは42歳，母Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithは38歳であった。1170年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルでIsabel Gressenhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。彼は1192年8月にパレスチナで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Osmund de Stuteville(이)가 대략 1116년 영국 요르크실르 버턴 애그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 Isabel Gressenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1192년 8월 팔레스타인에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Gressenhall, Mitford, Norfolk, England: Gressenhall, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Osmund de Stuteville nasceu aproximadamente 1116, em Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Gressenhall em 1170, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1192, em Palestina, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osmund de Stuteville родился около 1116 г. в местности буртон агнесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Gressenhall в 1170 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер август 1192 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 77 лет.

sm.from 1189 to 1192: mai le 1189 e o'o I le 1192

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Osmund de Stuteville nació aproximadamente 1116, en Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville III, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Isabel Gressenhall en 1170, en Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. Murió en agosto de 1192, en Palestina, a la edad de 77 años.
